analysis:
Based on your screen, here are the qualifying trades:

**Best Position Income CC:**
GOOGL - Sell $370 calls expiring 2026-06-18 (50 DTE) at $11.40 mid, delta 0.37, 23.7% annualized return

**IVP Environment:**
High volatility across the board (AAPL 74%, MSFT 85%, IBKR 73%) but most names are extended above MA50 or near highs - wait for better entry points. Only actionable trade is monetizing existing profitable GOOGL position with covered calls.

No qualifying CSPs, LEAPS, PMCCs, or Bull Call Spreads meet your criteria given the current elevated IV environment and technical setups.
